pr.title: Add 11L Shared Sparse Sidecar + EMA + AdamW TTT (1.0916 mean)

output.summary: Adds a shared late-layer sparse sidecar reused across sites with learned embeddings and scales to refine representations on the AdamW-TTT 11-layer trunk.
techniques: Shared sparse sidecar reused across multiple late insertion sites via site embeddings and residual scales
Gate-value-depthwise conv-proj pathway provides low-cost local mixing
Trimmed sparsity/bigram dims to keep the shared module cloud-legal
